reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely amazing spawning in all the props and using the webs in your room on mixed reality especially if you’re on quest three like me looks absolutely phenomenal the web shooting the way you can pull the webs the way you can open presents and get all sorts of props. It makes you actually feel like your Spider-Man the shooting is amazing amazing and it’s a really fun game to just mess around with if you’re bored if we add a few more props and a few more challenges, it could be even better, but still absolutely amazing game

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the amazing review! Really happy to hear you’re having fun with the webs and props! Messing around with the props in mixed reality is a big part of where the game started! Each prop is designed for interactive fun, enhancing the sense of control in web shooting and making you feel like you have real power in real life!

reviews.review_description: The webs are perfect! The game modes are so exciting and make you want to play more! I forgot to touch grass while playing this!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the amazing review! The web has gone through several upgrades and rewrites. I'm glad you like it!

reviews.review_description: you need this game.the webs are perfect and swinging is awesome.  please make it better on vr though

developer_response.body: Thank you for the awesome review and the suggestion! I’m really glad you’re enjoying the webs and swinging!

reviews.review_title: Best mixed reality spider man game
reviews.review_description: Getting the room scan was a but tough but when I got it it was so fun. You can shoot webs from your hands. The hand tracking sometimes does lose your hand but I guess that's the VRs fault.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review!

Here are two things that may help improve hand tracking:
1. Keeping your palms and fingers slightly visible to the headset.
2. In the tutorial, try testing different finger angles. For example, while shooting, if the pinky finger is too curled inward, it could prevent the gesture from being detected as a shoot.

Glad you’re enjoying the web shooting! An even cooler web-shooting experience is in development!

reviews.review_title: Web-Slinging Fun in Mixed Reality and VR
reviews.review_description:
Spatial Web Shooter is a clever and entertaining use of Mixed Reality — you collect gems by shooting webs like Spider-Man, and dodge incoming drones. And just when you think you’ve seen it all, the game switches things up with a fun VR mode where you suddenly face… dinosaurs!

It’s still in Early Access, but the foundation is solid and the game modes are already varied and enjoyable. The mechanics feel smooth, and it’s the kind of game you can easily jump into for a quick, satisfying session between more intense titles.

A light, well-executed MR experience that mixes creativity, action, and fun — worth keeping an eye on as it evolves.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the thoughtful review! I’m really glad you enjoyed the experience — it means a lot to hear such a positive perspective. I’ll keep building on this foundation and continue expanding the game with more creative interactions and experiences!

reviews.review_description:
Spatial Web Shooter transforms your living room into a web-slinging playground. From the very first web shot, I felt the instant magic: your hands become your superpowers, weaving webs that capture everything—decor and everyday objects alike. The challenge modes offer some very well-designed gameplay. Collect gems within a time limit while avoiding bombs that deduct points, dodge drones and their webs in a three-lives survival mode, and finally, the challenging dinosaur battle mode! The free play mode is a creative playground of pure fun; place a chair, a door, a fridge, and interact with your expertly launched webs. You can even add an interactive dinosaur that you can resize, make roar, and watch as it interacts with your webs. It's simple, yet effective, for creating memorable VR moments. Spatial Web Shooter is a burst of creativity that transforms your space into an amusement park. It's just exhilarating, fun, surprising, and perfect for impressing guests. Gameplay Mechanics: Hands-free or controller interaction: launch webs from your hands, anchor them to your environment, and manipulate objects with these webs. Instant magnetic effect. Webs can be stretched, released, attached to virtual surfaces… and even used to interact with a dinosaur!
My video review: https://youtu.be/-bNilcnw_QY

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the wonderful review and video! I’m thrilled you enjoyed both the challenge modes and free play—it means a lot to see the game experienced in the way it was designed. Excited to bring even more surprises in future updates!

reviews.review_description: Lets u shoot webs with hand tracking!!! Pls make a swinging feature tho

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review! Been working on it — stay tuned for future updates!

You can get an early look at the swinging mechanics here: https://tangochen.github.io/spatialwebshooter/quest/#whatsnext

reviews.review_description: Really fun but pls add a city map so I can swing around in hand tracking .. pls!!!!!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review! Glad you’re having fun. The next plan is to create a new Challenge focused on swinging — most likely without a city map, but it’ll still be fun! In the meantime, I’ve been collecting building assets, so that might happen in the future.

You can get an early look at the swinging mechanics here: https://tangochen.github.io/spatialwebshooter/quest/#whatsnext

reviews.review_description: The game starts up but once you try to do anything it crashes please fix this also im on quest 3 and im on the latest version which is 81

developer_response.body:
Hi! Sorry to hear you ran into crashes. Spatial Web Shooter is designed to run smoothly on Quest 2 / 3 / 3S / Pro. The app has been tested on v81 and runs without issue. Could you let me know more specifically, in what situations it crashes? That will help me track it down.

In the meantime, here are a few things to check that may help:
1. Have you tried uninstalling and reinstalling the game?
2. Does your device have enough storage space during installation and while running the game?
3. System Settings → Environment Setup → Space Setup → Set up – ensures the Quest recognizes your boundary.
4. System Settings → Privacy & Safety → Installed Apps → Spatial Web Shooter – make sure Spatial Data is enabled. (usually asked on first run)
5. After adjusting these, reopen the app.

If possible, sending a short video to the support email ( tan9ochen+sws@gmail.com ) would be very helpful in identifying the issue more directly.

reviews.review_description: It’s fun can’t swing tho still fun

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! Web swinging is definitely one of the most exciting experiences we’re all looking forward to. It’s planned as a challenge mode in a future update! I’ll also try to make it feel natural and intuitive. (Timing TBD)
